hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none text-[#1E231F] font-medium
hierarchy.h2: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-snug text-[#1E231F] font-medium
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#5C665D]

layout.borderRadius: rounded-sm (2px max) for a clinical, precise feel
layout.shadows: None. Use 1px solid borders (#E5E3DB) for separation.
patterns: Top summary row for KPIs (4 cards)
Main view: Table list of problems with a sophisticated filter bar
Detail view: Right-side slide-over Panel (Sheet) containing the problem details and the follow-up timeline
Side navigation rail for main app sections (Dashboard, Problemas, Relatórios)

components.buttons: Flat design, rounded-sm, high contrast text. Primary CTA uses brand green (#384C37).
components.cards: bg-white, border border-[#E5E3DB], no shadow, p-6. Rigid and structured.
components.inputs: bg-white, border-[#E5E3DB], rounded-sm, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#384C37] focus:border-[#384C37].
components.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned, text-sm. Hover rows with bg-[#F0EFEB]. Header is text-xs uppercase.
components.timeline: Vertical line in #E5E3DB. Timeline nodes use status colors. Dense layout.

icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) - Regular or Bold weight for clarity
accessibility: data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, rows, etc.)
High contrast ratios for all text.
instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Chivo (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body).
DO NOT use generic purple/blue gradients or generic SaaS rounded cards. Follow the flat, earthy, structured design.
Build the dashboard using pure Tailwind HTML for layout and customized Shadcn components for complex interactions (Tables, Select, Sheet, Dialog).
Ensure all Shadcn components (Cards, Buttons, Inputs) have their border-radius reduced to `rounded-sm` or `rounded-none`, and remove box-shadows.
Use Shadcn Sheet for the 'Detalhe do Problema' to slide in from the right when clicking a table row.
The timeline in the Sheet should allow adding a new 'Ponto de Situação' (Textarea + Status change dropdown).
All interface text MUST be in Portuguese (PT-PT) as requested: 'Problemas Abertos', 'Farmácia', 'Consultor', 'Tipologia' (TFO, Simples, Encomendas, Preço Plataforma), 'Data Prevista', etc.
